name: Quiche Filled Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 cup uncooked mostaccioli or elbow macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain.
2. In a large skillet, brown meat with onion; drain. Season with salt and pepper if desired. Stir in tomatoes, ketchup, and pasta. Heat through.
3. Stuff mushroom caps with the mixture. Top with cheese. Garnish if desired.
